body:
## Dealix Market Intelligence & Targeting OS

A governed daily targeting engine, not a "company search". The big rule:

> **نبحث بكثافة، نفلتر بصرامة، نرسل بقلة، ونوثّق كل ادعاء بدليل.**
> Search broadly, filter strictly, send rarely, evidence everything.

It moves through the funnel `~400 raw → 40–80 scored → 10–20 shortlist → 5–10 drafts → 3–5 manual sends`, and **never sends anything** — every draft stays `needs_approval`.

### What's in it

**Scripts (`scripts/`)**
- `research_targeting_os.py` — offline-first orchestrator (read-only; discovery disabled unless a vetted, robots-respecting provider + `--allow-network` is wired)
- `targeting_query_factory.py` — sector×city research queries from YAML + curated seeds
- `targeting_enrichment.py` — normalize domains, dedupe, firmographic/phase tagging
- `targeting_compliance_gate.py` — the non-negotiables wall (rejects LinkedIn/login-gated/leaked/personal-mobile sources)
- `targeting_scorecard.py` — deterministic 100-pt rubric → score + grade (A+/A/B/C/D)
- `targeting_draft_lab.py` — clean, evidence-cited Arabic drafts; rejects banned phrases (guarantees, pressure, auto-WhatsApp)
- `targeting_daily_brief.py` — daily funnel brief + top targets table

**Data (`data/targeting/`)** — `sectors.yml`, `cities.yml`, `signals.yml`, `scoring_weights.yml`, `blocked_sources.yml`, seed + master templates, curated queries. Daily `out/` artifacts are gitignored.

**Docs**
- `docs/01_go_to_market/` — Market Intelligence OS, Targeting Scorecard, Daily Research Loop, Sector Query Library, Outreach Draft Lab, Founder Shortlist Rules (+ index)
- `docs/03_governance/` — Research Source Policy, Robots & Terms (RFC 9309), Outreach Approval, No-Spam (+ index)

**CI** — `.github/workflows/daily-targeting-os.yml`: least-privilege (`contents: read`), runs the unit tests + the offline pipeline, uploads `data/targeting/out` as an artifact. No repo writes, no external sends.

### Governance / non-negotiables (enforced in code, not just docs)
- No scraping behind login · no leaked/purchased data · no LinkedIn automation · no personal mobile numbers
- Respects `robots.txt` and site terms; discovery is a no-op by default
- No external action without founder approval — there is **no send channel anywhere in the pipeline**
- Every target needs ≥2 independent evidence sources before a draft

### Verification
- `40 passing` unit tests across scorecard, compliance gate, draft lab, query factory
- `ruff check` clean; `black` formatted (py311)
- End-to-end run on the seed template produces all six artifacts (`company_master.jsonl`, `ranked_targets.csv`, `daily_targeting_brief.md`, `founder_shortlist.md`, `drafts_for_review.md`, `tomorrow_targeting_plan.md`) and a clean `needs_approval` draft

### How to run
```bash
python scripts/research_targeting_os.py \
  --seed data/targeting/company_seed_template.csv \
  --out data/targeting/out --top 80
```

https://claude.ai/code/session_016NKnrMJ2jS3NVt9GB83t5b

---
_Generated by [Claude Code](https://claude.ai/code/session_016NKnrMJ2jS3NVt9GB83t5b)_

commits.messageBody:
A governed daily targeting engine: research broadly, filter strictly,
send rarely, evidence everything. Searches up to ~400 raw candidates,
cleans + dedupes them, scores each on a 100-point rubric, flags the
likely Dealix OS weakness, and emits a small set of founder-review
drafts. It never sends anything — drafts stay needs_approval.

Scripts (scripts/):
- research_targeting_os.py  — offline-first orchestrator (read-only)
- targeting_query_factory.py — sector×city research queries
- targeting_enrichment.py    — normalize + dedupe + firmographic tagging
- targeting_compliance_gate.py — non-negotiables wall (blocks login/leak/LI)
- targeting_scorecard.py     — deterministic 100-pt score + grade
- targeting_draft_lab.py     — clean, evidence-cited drafts (no banned phrases)
- targeting_daily_brief.py   — daily funnel brief

Data (data/targeting/): sectors, cities, signals, scoring_weights,
blocked_sources, seed + master templates.

Docs: docs/01_go_to_market/ (6 GTM docs + index),
docs/03_governance/ (research source, robots/terms, approval, no-spam).

CI: .github/workflows/daily-targeting-os.yml — least-privilege
(contents: read), runs unit tests + offline pipeline, uploads artifacts.

Tests: 40 passing across scorecard, compliance gate, draft lab, query factory.
commits.messageHeadline: feat(gtm): Dealix Market Intelligence & Targeting OS
